name: ai-workflows
description: Portable workflow skills for guided product and engineering work in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guided idea, spec, plan, implementation, review, and close-out workflows.
interface.longDescription: A portable workflow package that coordinates the active Codex session as orchestrator with specialized subagents as operators and reviewers.
defaultPrompt: Use workflow-run to guide this idea through idea, spec, plan, implementation, reviews, and docs close-out.
Use skeptical-review to pressure-test this workflow artifact.
